items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Albemarle paid down a large amount of debt in the first quarter. In the first quarter, it grew sales by 33% year over year. Chinese spot prices have climbed back into the $23 per kilogram (kg) range, up from their $10 kg low in the fall of 2024, thanks to a restocking cycle by ba

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised Albemarle from High Risk to Buy, target price $225. Citi assessed that the possibility of the lithium market shifting to a significant oversupply phase is low.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billion and $2.9 billion, respectively. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC reiterated its outperform rating and boosted its price target to $257 per share.
